steps.title: Supply the publication date
steps.content: The student's goal is to specify when al-Farisi published his landmass theory. The relevant note gives that date: he published the theory in 1037 CE. The answer must include that exact year.

steps.title: Reject choices without the date
steps.content: Choice B mentions publication but omits 1037 CE. Choice C describes al-Farisi's field of study and says nothing about the theory's publication. Choice D describes the theory but omits when it was published. The sentence with 1037 CE directly fulfills the goal. The answer is A.
